primary_flags.summary: Pre-signal — intelligence-channel framing. ROW-2373: 'And Abby doesn't need to tell her that she can't have a treat if she tells me what's going on. That bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth.' ROW-2374: 'You both shouldn't be telling her not to tell me stuff. That's shady.' ROW-2375: 'And don't be leaving her in the car with Abby alone either. That's contempt of court.' Melissa asserts that Olivia is her information source about Eli's household — framing any instruction from Eli or Abby to Olivia to maintain appropriate privacy as 'shady' and obstructive. This is an early assertion of the intelligence-channel claim: Melissa positions herself as entitled to receive Olivia's reports about Eli's household without any filter. Compound with RF-01 (ROW-2373-2375 is RF01-B007-S001 ADD-004). Note: pre-signal per ADD-002 — precedes confirmed coaching admission (ROW-6819, B-018).
exact_quotes: ROW-2373: 'And Abby doesn't need to tell her that she can't have a treat if she tells me what's going on. That bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth'
ROW-2374: 'You both shouldn't be telling her not to tell me stuff. That's shady'
ROW-2375: 'And don't be leaving her in the car with Abby alone either. That's contempt of court'
primary_flags.rf08_mechanism: Intelligence-channel assertion: Melissa explicitly frames Olivia as her information pipeline from Eli's household, and characterizes any household privacy instruction as obstruction.
primary_flags.abby_add004_note: ROW-2373 implicates Abby in Olivia's information gatekeeping — consistent with CP2 ADD-004 Abby behavioral loyalty coaching context. Melissa's reaction to Abby's instruction to Olivia suggests Abby is perceived as a threat to Melissa's intelligence channel.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF08-001 CANDIDATE: 1 signal. S001 establishes the intelligence-channel sub-pattern. Arc requires second signal to promote to WATCHING.

compound_patterns.description: Intelligence-channel framing compounds with RF-01 ADD-004 relay: ROW-2373-2375 both establishes Melissa's claim to Olivia's intelligence pipeline (RF-08) and delivers an Abby-attack within a parental alienation cluster (RF-01).

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Phase A. Pre-Abby-escalation early period. S001 is the first RF-08 primary signal in the dataset.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: One Sev-1 pre-signal: ROW-2373-2375 documents Melissa's assertion of her right to receive intelligence from Olivia about Eli's household. This is the earliest documented triangulation mechanism in the dataset — predates the confirmed coaching admission by 15+ months.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-01 ADD-004 compound. The intelligence-channel framing in ROW-2374 ('shouldn't be telling her not to tell me stuff') is structurally the mirror of ROW-6819's coaching admission: where ROW-6819 shows Melissa scripting Olivia's outbound reports TO Eli, ROW-2374 shows Melissa asserting her claim to Olivia's inbound reports FROM Eli's household.
